title: Counter Mod
description: Do a countdown in the chat
body:
# Counter Mod

**Counter Mod**: This mod performs a countdown in the chat. It is primarily configured to do a countdown for a restart.  
The command is `/counter {Seconds}` and the countdown will begin.  
The text can be modified in the `config/counter.json` file. `%d` is the placeholder for the seconds.  
**A sound will be played to all players to alert them of the countdown.**  
  
_The mod only needs to be installed on the server._
